customerprofiles.integration.task.CfnAbo: The `Task` property type specifies the class for modeling different type of tasks. Task implementation varies based on the TaskType.

customerprofiles.integration.task.Connec.Description: The operation to be performed on the provided source fields.

customerprofiles.integration.task.Destin.Description: A field in a destination connector, or a field value against which Amazon AppFlow validates a source field.

customerprofiles.integration.task.Source.Description: The source fields to which a particular task is applied.

customerprofiles.integration.task.TaskPr.Description: A map used to store task-related information. The service looks for particular information based on the TaskType.

customerprofiles.integration.task.TaskTy.Description: Specifies the particular task implementation that Amazon AppFlow performs.
customerprofiles.integration.task.TaskTy.Allowed values: Arithmetic | Filter | Map | Mask | Merge | Truncate | Validate
